---
project:
  type: website

website:
  title: "Bansi Khachar"
  navbar:
    left:
      - href: about.qmd
        text: About

format:
  html:
    theme: lux
    css: styles.css
    toc: true

editor: visual
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

:: {.columns vertical-align="center"} ::: {.column width="60%"} \# Hi, I’m Bansi Khachar

I’m an analyst focused on digital marketing and data analytics. I turn raw data into clear, actionable insights—mixing technical skill with creative strategy to produce results. :::

![](images/IMG_7286.jpg):::

## About Me

I’m pursuing an M.S. in Digital Marketing at Cal Poly Pomona (expected May 2026). I work across R, Python, and web analytics—building dashboards, teaching hands-on workshops, and creating reproducible work with Quarto to tell clear data stories. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index="0"}

## What I Do

-   **Data Analysis & Visualization:** Build interactive, informative visuals in R and Python.
-   **Digital Marketing Strategy:** Use web analytics, SEO, and campaign insights to improve performance.
-   **Workshops & Training:** Teach practical, hands-on sessions for students and professionals.
-   **Reproducible Reporting:** Create integrated reports and sites with Quarto. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index="1"}

## Let’s Connect

I’m always open to collaborating and sharing ideas—reach out or connect with me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bansikhachar29/). :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index="2"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Welcome to my portfolio—where data meets creativity and reproducibility supports innovation. :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index="3"}
